rationale: The synthetic det_set_mapping has the original `set_mapping` ensures only as the antecedent of an implication in its postcondition, so they are not free hypotheses inside the body — that is why previous sibling attempts that opened with a bare `assert(forall|i| post*@[i] =~= pre@[i])` failed to verify. Putting the relevant page_array conjuncts inside an `if A { ... }` materializes them as hypotheses; we then bridge the disjoint per-run triggers with an `assert forall|i| ... by` that case-splits on `i == idx` (where the 8 field-pinning ensures collapse both Pages to the same value) versus `i != idx` (where mentioning both `post1_self_.page_array@[i]` and `post2_self_.page_array@[i]` fires both ensures via their shared `pre_self_.page_array@[i]` trigger), and close with `Seq` extensionality (`=~=`).
